name: Hungarian Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic meatballs and set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet.
3. Add onions and cook until tender.
4. Add cooked meatballs, 3/4 cup water, red wine, caraway seed, paprika, marjoram leaves, and salt to the skillet.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Mix 1/4 cup water and flour separately.
8. Stir into the sauce mixture in the skillet.
9. Heat until boiling, stirring carefully.
10. Boil and stir for an additional minute.
11. Serve with boiled potatoes or noodles.
